name: Nanjing Textiles Import & Export Corp., Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Textiles Import & Export Corp., Ltd. engages in the import and export of textiles and garments in China and internationally. It also produces pharmaceuticals; develops and produces discharge lamps comprising HPSL, metal halide lamps, and high pressure mercury lamps; and operates an exhibition center. In addition, the company develops real estate properties; and produces slipcovers, mattress covers, curtains, back cushions, and beddings. Nanjing Textiles Import & Export Corp., Ltd. was founded in 1978 and is based in Nanjing, China.
